text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces.

example.note: wcag_target must be 2.1-AA (not 2.2); missing population_bucket, deadline, scope_urls, audit_evidence, gaps.

list.item: Missing audit_evidence — Title II requires evidenced conformance.
Scope omitting third-party embeds on public surfaces.
